name: baton-codex-runtime-bridge
description: Validates and exposes the official Codex primary runtime when the CLI omits load_workspace_dependencies.

interface.shortDescription: Restore official workspace dependencies in Codex CLI.
interface.longDescription: Uses a validated resolver for the installed OpenAI primary runtime when Codex CLI exposes its plugins but omits the workspace dependency loader.
defaultPrompt: Resolve the official Codex runtime for this spreadsheet task
